audio_summary: The video features a mobile tower defense/battle game. The audio landscape includes an epic orchestral battle BGM, a heroic menu BGM, various combat SFX like missile launches and stone-crumbling explosions, and crisp UI sounds for unit selection, placement, and end-game screens.

sounds.name: Battle Theme
sounds.description: Epic orchestral battle music with driving strings, bold brass, and heavy percussion.
sounds.game_event: Plays continuously during the main battle gameplay.
sounds.generation_prompt: Epic orchestral battle music, fast-paced 130 BPM, driving staccato strings, bold brass section, heavy cinematic percussion, tense and heroic mood, mobile game style, seamless loop

sounds.name: Menu Theme
sounds.description: Heroic and uplifting orchestral menu music with a triumphant brass melody.
sounds.game_event: Plays on the main menu screen after the battle concludes.
sounds.generation_prompt: Heroic orchestral menu music, mid-tempo, triumphant brass melody, marching snare, uplifting and adventurous mood, mobile game style, seamless loop

sounds.name: Missile Launch
sounds.description: A quick, airy whoosh sound representing a cartoon missile being fired.
sounds.game_event: When a unit fires a missile at the enemy castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: Cartoon missile launch, quick airy whoosh, high-pitched rocket trail, short duration, mobile game style

sounds.name: Explosion Impact
sounds.description: A booming explosion sound with stone crumbling, indicating damage to the castle.
sounds.game_event: When missiles hit and damage the enemy castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: Cartoon explosion, deep booming impact, stone crumbling and debris scattering, low-mid frequency, sharp attack with medium decay, mobile game style

sounds.name: Castle Destroyed
sounds.description: A massive, heavy explosion with a long rumble, signifying the complete destruction of a castle.
sounds.game_event: When the enemy castle's health reaches zero and it collapses.
sounds.generation_prompt: Large cartoon explosion, massive booming impact, heavy stone crumbling, low frequency rumble, sharp attack with long decay, mobile game style

sounds.name: Fireworks
sounds.description: A series of sharp pops and crackles representing fireworks.
sounds.game_event: Plays during the end-of-battle sequence as fireworks appear.
sounds.generation_prompt: Cartoon fireworks, series of sharp pops and crackles, high frequency, festive and celebratory, mobile game style

sounds.name: Unit Select Tap
sounds.description: A crisp, wooden click sound for selecting a unit.
sounds.game_event: When the player taps a unit icon in the bottom UI panel.
sounds.generation_prompt: UI button tap, crisp wooden click, short punchy attack, high-mid frequency, dry texture, mobile game style

sounds.name: Unit Place Pop
sounds.description: A soft, satisfying pop sound when a unit is placed on the battlefield.
sounds.game_event: When the player drags and drops a unit into a slot in their castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: UI drag and drop, soft pop, quick attack, mid frequency, clean and satisfying, mobile game style

sounds.name: Battle Failed Jingle
sounds.description: A short, descending orchestral sting indicating defeat.
sounds.generation_prompt: Defeat jingle, descending orchestral brass and strings, disappointed and dramatic mood, short duration, mobile game style

sounds.name: Reward Tally Chimes
sounds.description: Rapid, high-pitched metallic chimes for counting rewards.
sounds.game_event: When the reward trophies are tallied on the end screen.
sounds.generation_prompt: Reward tally, rapid high-pitched metallic chimes, bright and rewarding, short duration, mobile game style
